title: Rebuild Evangelion Chronicle
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild Evangelion Chronicle             Quote Post by darthikari » Wed Sep 15, 2010 10:15 am The Chronicle magazine/binder series has restarted with issue 31. The first issue sports a Mari cover and has a new binder featuring the movie posters from 1.0 and 2.0. They retail for approximately $10, and the first issue that I purchased through Books Sanseido came with the binder at no extra charge. They are scheduled for weekly releases, and there are at least ten issues planned. [img][URL=http://img543.imageshack.us/i/dsc03163.jpg/] [/URL] [URL=http://img340.imageshack.us/i/dsc03164ke.jpg/] [/URL] [URL=http://img138.imageshack.us/i/dsc03165a.jpg/] [/URL] [URL=http://img180.imageshack.us/i/dsc03166q.jpg/] [/URL] [URL=http://img155.imageshack.us/i/dsc03167e.jpg/] [/URL] [/img]

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Sep 15, 2010 12:10 pm I thought it was reprinted from Vol 1 to Vol 30 (Vol 30 is where the original Chronicle ended and featured Yui on the cover), while Vol 31-onward is new to continue 1.0/2.0 stuff. Basically, this: http://www.evageeks.org/2009/12/evangelion-chronicle-reprint/ Still, thanks for the images. Nice to see some of what it has inside. I'd be interested in getting Chronicle if I had the money (and space) for it.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Sep 15, 2010 4:20 pm Fudge. I completely forgot that they were rereleasing the old ones and now are spamming the new ones. Just perfect when I thought I had spent the last of my animu monies for the year and another horrible semester started. All the re-released ones are out of stock already at the usual places. I really want this but not bad enough to have to pay some asshole many times the original price on ebay.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Wed Sep 15, 2010 11:13 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I thought it was reprinted from Vol 1 to Vol 30 (Vol 30 is where the original Chronicle ended and featured Yui on the cover), while Vol 31-onward is new to continue 1.0/2.0 stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Sep 16, 2010 6:05 am Where are you buying them from and for how much? (yen-wise)

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Thu Sep 16, 2010 10:33 am [url]http://www.hlj.com/hljlist2/?word2=&DisplayMode=list&Dis=-2&MacroType=IllBoo&Word=eva+chronicle[/url] 657yen each, weekly. Although you're out of luck if you want to start buying them all now.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Tue Nov 02, 2010 4:02 pm Sorry. Someone needs to fix the wiki page here: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Evangelion_Chronicle_(Glossary_Index) with this: http://web.archive.org/web/20070220084536/http://www.sonymagazines.jp/eva/

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 02, 2010 9:07 pm Done. Thanks! ____ I'd love to get the Rebuild-related issues of Chronicle, but I'd prefer it if it was of the whole film series and not just 1.0/2.0... I am curious on whether or not it gives extra information on characters (Mari, Asuka) or information compared to what the films give us.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Nov 03, 2010 4:50 am I've already bought the original Chronicle twice (long story...), so I'm definitely holding out this time. They are so totally gonna do this "updated edition" thing again when all the films are out. I GUARANTEE IT!!! So, Faz... Do you have access to a scanner?

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Tue Nov 16, 2010 11:20 am :-{| Yes, and you know it. I'll start scanning as soon as they finish, and I put them in the binders, and I manage to get my scanner working again. EDIT: For anyone that's interested, it appears that the rebuild related issues stopped at Issue No. 40, and it looks like 41 and onwards are "Story Files", and come with their own folder. I'll take apart the rebuild issues in order to scan them and put them into the folder as soon as I can, and as soon as my scanner stops chucking a hissy fit.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 28, 2010 7:40 am Bump by request for glorious things in-coming.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sun Nov 28, 2010 7:48 am Alrighty, here we are then. After many DAYS of scanning, I have completed the majority of the Eva Rebuild Chronicles. I skipped the Extras Sheets because there's lots of them and it mostly merchandise and pachinko, but if there is a demand for them I'll scan them too. So, here you go: [url]http://www.mediafire.com/?4yvqquv498gkt[/url] NOW GIVE ME ALL YOUR LOVE AND PRAISE!

[]:             Quote Post by vito » Sun Nov 28, 2010 8:09 am Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 28, 2010 1:05 pm So I wanted to see if maybe those Relationship Diagram Character Sheets for Webuild and Puchi Eva could be translated, but they're not really OCRable. At least not at the level/way they were scanned. Oh well. All these scans are awesome to look at regardless. Thanks, Faz!

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sun Nov 28, 2010 2:35 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Sun Nov 28, 2010 10:09 pm Fazmotron wrote: NOW GIVE ME ALL YOUR LOVE AND PRAISE!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Nov 28, 2010 10:11 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: -Unit 00 is listed as 00/00' on its profile page; wonder what the 00' stuff is in reference to? Hadn't heard of that before.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Nov 28, 2010 10:23 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: It just looks like Rebuild is doing the same thing but using the prime symbol communicate the modification. Both times Eva-00 gets upgraded/modified after being cooked by Remiel.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Nov 28, 2010 10:42 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: But there were relevant differences between the before and after Ramiel battle version in NME? I didn't notice them (but maybe it's only my blindness/low attention).

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Nov 29, 2010 12:35 am In both TV and NME Eva-00 gains a new chestplate design as well as pylons and a paint job. Although in NME the only paintjob difference is the white going away from the thighs.
